label: Track 1 Balanced
mandate: Trade only BSC eligible assets through TWAK. Keep total drawdown below 22 percent, daily drawdown below 7 percent, position size below 18 percent, new position size below 12 percent, stable reserve at least 10 percent, slippage below 0.8 percent, and satisfy one daily trade.

label: Defensive Demo
mandate: Trade only through TWAK on BSC. Keep total drawdown below 15 percent, daily drawdown below 4 percent, position size below 12 percent, new position size below 8 percent, stable reserve at least 25 percent, and slippage below 0.5 percent.

label: Aggressive Rotation
mandate: Use TWAK only for BSC trading. Keep total drawdown below 23 percent, daily drawdown below 9 percent, position size below 20 percent, new position size below 15 percent, stable reserve at least 8 percent, slippage below 1.0 percent, and maintain daily trade activity.
